mapping.a_element: iso-height contour lines on the WO3 surface (domain-wall / interface curves)
mapping.b_element: boundaries of critical percolation clusters on the triangular grid

mapping.a_element: conformal invariance of the critical curves, i.e. the SLE_kappa description
mapping.b_element: conformal invariance of critical percolation in the scaling limit that yields the asymptotic surrounding/crossing formula

mapping.a_element: SLE diffusivity kappa ~ 3 fixing the critical Ising universality class
mapping.b_element: the critical-percolation universality class (SLE_6) of the triangular-grid interfaces

mapping.a_element: statistics of the random contour curves (domain-wall statistics)
mapping.b_element: probability that a cluster boundary surrounds the interior point 0 while touching the boundary arc A

brief_justification: Both study conformally invariant random curves at a 2D critical point - iso-height/domain-wall contours in A and critical-percolation cluster boundaries in B - characterized by the same Schramm-Loewner Evolution / conformal-invariance machinery. A's SLE_kappa critical interfaces play the role of B's critical-percolation (SLE_6) cluster boundaries, and B's asymptotic surrounding formula is exactly the conformally invariant interface probability this framework governs.
